# CMakeLists.txt for RapidJSON (source build - header only)
# This file is a placeholder.
# RapidJSON has its own CMake build system.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
project(wazuh_ext_rapidjson NONE)

message(STATUS "This CMakeLists.txt (src/engine/external/rapidjson/CMakeLists.txt) is a placeholder. RapidJSON's own CMake script is used directly.")
